programme.title: Gemini Man, (2019, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Will Smith stars in the nonstop action thrill-ride from Academy Award®-winning director Ang Lee. Retired hitman (Smith) is forced on the run and finds himself hunted by his ultimate adversary - a younger clone of himself.

programme.title: The Pursuit of Happyness, (2006, Drama)
programme.desc: Inspired by the true story about a single father and his young son. Finding themselves homeless, he risks everything on an unpaid internship in a highly competitive stockbroker training program, where only one in twenty interns make the grade.

programme.title: Undisputed, (2002, Action)
programme.desc: When the world's heavyweight champion is sent to prison, everything points to an inevitable showdown with the penitentiary's undefeated champ. But to make sure the meeting will happen, a former mob boss must call in favors from the outside world.

programme.title: Get Rich or Die Tryin', (2005, Musical)
programme.desc: Following a near-fatal gun battle, Marcus recalls his journey from orphaned street kid from the Bronx to making his mark in the drug trade to teaming up with a fellow ex-con (Terrence Howard) for his shot at becoming a successful rap artist.

programme.title: Gemini Man, (2019, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Will Smith stars in the nonstop action thrill-ride from Academy Award®-winning director Ang Lee. Retired hitman (Smith) is forced on the run and finds himself hunted by his ultimate adversary - a younger clone of himself.

programme.title: Bebe's Kids, (1992, Comedy)
programme.desc: When ladies' man Robin meets the beautiful Jamika at a funeral service, he feels he must have died and gone to heaven.

programme.title: The Wood, (1999, African-American Romance)
programme.desc: Lots of guys have second thoughts about marriage. Three hours before his wedding, Roland is having third, fourth and fifth thoughts. Good thing he’s got buddies Slim and Mike around to help.

programme.title: Don't Tell Mom the Babysitter's Dead, (2024, Comedy)
programme.desc: Tanya finds her summer plans canceled when her mom jets off for a last-minute retreat and the elderly babysitter who arrives at her door unexpectedly passes away.

programme.title: Attack the Block, (2011, Science fiction)
programme.desc: ATTACK THE BLOCK is a fast, funny, frightening action adventure movie that pits a teen street gang against an invasion of savage alien monsters. It turns a crazy mix of tough street kids into a team of kick ass heroes.

programme.title: Shadow, (2018, Action)
programme.desc: To finally achieve victory over a rival kingdom, a brilliant general devises an intricate plan involving his wife, a look-alike, and two kings.

programme.title: Bodyguards and Assassins, (2009, Action)
programme.desc: In 1905, revolutionist Sun Yat-Sen visits Hong Kong to discuss plans with Tongmenghui members to overthrow the Qing dynasty. But when they find out that assassins have been sent to kill him, they assemble a group of protectors to prevent any attacks.

programme.title: Iron Monkey, (1993, Action)
programme.desc: Presented by Quentin Tarantino, Iron Monkey is the spirited tale of a mysterious and mythical Chinese legend in this exhilarating non-stop martial arts excitement.

programme.title: True Legend, (2010, Action)
programme.desc: Su Qi-Er retired from his life as a renowned Qing dynasty general in order to pursue his dream of a family and his own martial arts school.

programme.title: Sakra, (2023, Adventure)
programme.desc: Starring & directed by international action star Donnie Yen—When a respected martial artist is accused of murder, he goes on the run in search of answers about his own mysterious origin story and the unknown enemies working to destroy him.

programme.title: Chasing the Dragon, (2017, Action)
programme.desc: Donnie Yen stars as infamous real-life drug kingpin Crippled Ho, who ruthlessly carved out his empire in 1960's Hong Kong.

programme.title: Raging Fire, (2021, Action)
programme.desc: Shan (Donnie Yen) is a hardline cop with a long history of success, but his past comes back to haunt him when a sting is attacked by a group led by his former protégé (Nicholas Tse), a man set on destroying everyone who ever wronged him.

programme.title: Iron Monkey, (1993, Action)
programme.desc: Presented by Quentin Tarantino, Iron Monkey is the spirited tale of a mysterious and mythical Chinese legend in this exhilarating non-stop martial arts excitement.

programme.title: Click, (2006, Comedy)
programme.desc: When a harried workaholic is given a universal remote that allows him to pause, rewind, or skip past portions of his life, he discovers which parts are truly the best of his life.

programme.title: Ferris Bueller's Day Off, (1986, Screwball)
programme.desc: High school senior, Ferris Bueller, decides to cut school and is determined to experience a day of pure freedom with his girlfriend and best friend in downtown Chicago before graduating.

programme.title: Nacho Libre, (2006, Comedy)
programme.desc: Jack Black is more hilarious than ever as Ignacio, a monastery cook who feeds orphan children by day and by night transforms himself into Nacho Libre, a notorious Luchador in stretchy pants.

programme.title: The House Bunny, (2008, Screwball)
programme.desc: When Shelley gets kicked out of the mansion, she's lost in the wilds of Beverly Hills until she stumbles upon the sorriest sorority on campus. Now it's up to her to spruce up the girls and heat up the Zeta house before the University shuts them down.

programme.title: Ferris Bueller's Day Off, (1986, Screwball)
programme.desc: High school senior, Ferris Bueller, decides to cut school and is determined to experience a day of pure freedom with his girlfriend and best friend in downtown Chicago before graduating.

programme.title: The House Bunny, (2008, Screwball)
programme.desc: When Shelley gets kicked out of the mansion, she's lost in the wilds of Beverly Hills until she stumbles upon the sorriest sorority on campus. Now it's up to her to spruce up the girls and heat up the Zeta house before the University shuts them down.

programme.title: Legally Blonde, (2001, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: Elle Woods has it all, but when her boyfriend goes to Harvard, Ellie rallies all her resources to get into Harvard Law. But law school is a far cry from the comforts of home. Elle must wage the battle of her life, for herself and for all blondes!

programme.title: Legally Blonde 2: Red, White & Blonde, (2003, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: Now a rising lawyer, Elle Woods is about to make partner at her firm, she and Emmett are still love, and her hair is still healthy. Elle heads to D.C. and take matters into her own hands.

programme.title: Best Men, (1999, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: Drew Barrymore, Luke Wilson and Sean Patrick Flannery star in this hilarious action-comedy wherein Drew Barrymore is a young woman determined to have the perfect wedding day, despite the fact that the groomsmen have decided to rob the local bank.

programme.title: Strictly Ballroom, (1992, Drama)
programme.desc: A championship ballroom dancer finds inspiration within, and decides he'll stop at nothing to win, even if it means rewriting the rules. A worldwide feel-good hit, with an incredible soundtrack, from director Baz Luhrmann (MOULIN ROUGE!).

programme.title: Autumn In New York, (2000, Drama)
programme.desc: Autumn in New York follows the sexual exploits of Will Keane (RICHARD GERE) until he runs into an unexpected dead end when he meets Charlotte Fielding (WINONA RYDER). Charlotte is half Will's age and twice his match.

programme.title: Terms of Endearment, (1983, Drama)
programme.desc: Terms of Endearment dazzled critics and audiences alike with its believable, insightful story of two captivating people, mother and daughter, unforgettably played by Shirley MacLaine and Debra Winger.

programme.title: Pretty In Pink, (1986, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: She’s a high school girl from the wrong side of town. He’s the wealthy heartthrob who asks her to the prom. But as fast as their romance builds, it’s threatened by the painful reality of peer pressure.

programme.title: Ella Enchanted, (2004, Fantasy)
programme.desc: Oscar-winner Anne Hathaway stars in an unforgettable, modern fairy tale in which a girl's given the gift of obedience by her Fairy Godmother. An amazing, magical adventure bursting with colorful characters, music, wit, and whimsy.

programme.title: Just Like Heaven, (2005, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: He's convinced she's a spirit. She's convinced she's still alive. As they search for the truth of Elizabeth's past, their relationship changes from resentment to romance.

programme.title: Serendipity, (2001, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: In the course of one magical evening, Jonathan (John Cusack) and Sara (Kate Beckinsale) meet unexpectedly, but part ways, determining that fate will guide their future if they're meant to be together.

programme.title: Forces of Nature, (1999, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: Ben is trying to get to Savannah for his wedding. A seagull flies into the engine as the plane is taking off. All later flights are canceled because of an approaching hurricane, so he hitches a ride in with an attractive woman named Sara.

programme.title: The Manchurian Candidate, (2003, Science fiction)
programme.desc: As the entire nation watches the presidential campaign hurtle towards Election Day, one soldier races to uncover the conspiracy behind it - a conspiracy that seeks to destroy democracy itself.

programme.title: Identity, (2003, Thriller)
programme.desc: What if every choice we ever make was already made for us? What if there really were no coincidences in life and our destinies were already predetermined? Ten strangers with secrets are brought together in a savage rainstorm. Rated: R

programme.title: Revolver, (2005, Action)
programme.desc: REVOLVER is populated with Guy Ritchie's (Snatch; Lock, Stock & Two Smoking Barrels) classic breed of fast-talking, sharp-suited gangsters but with a psychological twist that your mind may not be able to handle.

programme.title: The Firm, (1993, Thriller)
programme.desc: Mitch joins a prosperous Memphis firm that affords Mitch and his wife an affluent lifestyle beyond their wildest dreams. But when FBI agents confront him with evidence of corruption and murder within the firm, Mitch sets out to find the truth.

programme.title: Vanilla Sky, (2001, Drama)
programme.desc: Young and wealthy, David can have anything his heart desires. But his life seems incomplete. One night, David meets the woman of his dreams and believes he may have found the missing piece.

programme.title: John Grisham's The Rainmaker, (1997, Thriller)
programme.desc: Matt Damon plays Rudy Baylor, a rookie lawyer in over his head on a high-profile case. Opposing him: an army of legal sharks. On Rudy’s side: Deck Shifflet, a feisty “paralawyer” who specializes in flunking the bar exam.

programme.title: The Firm, (1993, Thriller)
programme.desc: Mitch joins a prosperous Memphis firm that affords Mitch and his wife an affluent lifestyle beyond their wildest dreams. But when FBI agents confront him with evidence of corruption and murder within the firm, Mitch sets out to find the truth.

programme.title: Half Nelson, (2006, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: A powerful, award-winning film about an inner-city junior high school teacher with a drug habit who forms an unlikely friendship with one of his students after she discovers his secret.

programme.title: Minari, (2021, Drama)
programme.desc: A tender and sweeping story about what roots us, Minari follows a Korean-American family that moves to an Arkansas farm in search of their own American Dream.

programme.title: Girl, Interrupted, (1999, Drama)
programme.desc: Winona Ryder and Academy Award(r)-winner Angelina Jolie are the certifiable stars of Claymoore Hospital's South Bell ward in this wry adaptation of Susanna Kaysen's best-selling memoir.

programme.title: Titanic, (1997, Drama)
programme.desc: Leonardo DiCaprio and Oscar-nominee Kate Winslet light up the screen as Jack and Rose, the young lovers who find one another on the maiden voyage of the "unsinkable" R.M.S. Titanic.

programme.title: An Unfinished Life, (2005, Drama)
programme.desc: Einar Gilkyson (Robert Redford) lives on a Wyoming ranch with his only friend, Mitch (Morgan Freeman). Then, suddenly, the woman he blames for his son's death arrives at his door broke, desperate, and with a granddaughter he's never known.

programme.title: We Own the Night, (2007, Thriller)
programme.desc: What if your own family stood in the way of everything you worked for? Bobby Green (Joaquin Phoenix) has forsaken his name to escape his family and their tradition in law enforcement to pursue his ambitions as a Brooklyn nightclub owner. Rated R

programme.title: Titanic, (1997, Drama)
programme.desc: Leonardo DiCaprio and Oscar-nominee Kate Winslet light up the screen as Jack and Rose, the young lovers who find one another on the maiden voyage of the "unsinkable" R.M.S. Titanic.

programme.title: Texas Rangers, (2001, Western)
programme.desc: After the Civil War, Texas is at the mercy of murderous bandits. A group of unlikely heroes emerges to battle these renegade outlaws. Out-manned, they summon the courage to protect the innocent and put the wrong things right in their beloved homeland.

programme.title: Jane Got a Gun, (2015, Western)
programme.desc: A woman asks her ex-lover for help in order to save her outlaw husband from a gang out to kill him.

programme.title: Outlaws and Angels, (2016, Western)
programme.desc: When Outlaws on the lam invade the home of an unsuspecting, seemingly innocent frontier family to hide out for the night, an unexpected game of cat and mouse ensues, leading to seduction, role reversal, and ultimately, bloody revenge.

programme.title: South of Heaven, West of Hell, (2001, Western)
programme.desc: A small-town marshal, tormented by the puzzling conditions that surround him, is forced to confront his demons at an unexpected and untraditional 'family reunion'.

programme.title: Texas Rangers, (2001, Western)
programme.desc: After the Civil War, Texas is at the mercy of murderous bandits. A group of unlikely heroes emerges to battle these renegade outlaws. Out-manned, they summon the courage to protect the innocent and put the wrong things right in their beloved homeland.

programme.title: True Grit, (2010, Drama)
programme.desc: True Grit is a powerful story of vengeance and valor set in an unforgiving and unpredictable frontier where justice is simple and mercy is rare.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven, (2016, Western)
programme.desc: Director Antoine Fuqua brings his modern vision to the classic western, a story of seven outlaws who join together to save a town from an evil industrialist! Denzel Washington, Chris Pratt, Ethan Hawke and Vincent D'Onofrio and Peter Sarsgaard star!

programme.title: Lawless, (2012, Crime)
programme.desc: Shia LaBeouf, Tom Hardy, and Jessica Chastain star in this adaptation of 'The Wettest County in the World.' A bootlegging gang make a run for the American Dream during Prohibition.

programme.desc: Air, Water, Earth, Fire. Four nations are tied by destiny when Fire launches war against the others. Caught between the war, one Avatar discovers he's able to manipulate all four elements.

programme.title: Galaxy Quest, (1999, Adventure)
programme.desc: Nearly twenty years after the cult TV show Galaxy Quest was cancelled, the alumni cast is asked for help by an alien species in order to save the universe.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, (2020, Action)
programme.desc: The world needed a hero; we got a hedgehog. Superpowered with speed, Sonic races to save the world and stop evil genius Dr. Robotnik from world domination. Jim Carrey, Ben Schwartz, and James Marsden star in the adventure that the whole family will enjoy.

programme.title: The Last Airbender, (2010, Adventure)
programme.desc: Air, Water, Earth, Fire. Four nations are tied by destiny when Fire launches war against the others. Caught between the war, one Avatar discovers he's able to manipulate all four elements.

programme.title: Galaxy Quest, (1999, Adventure)
programme.desc: Nearly twenty years after the cult TV show Galaxy Quest was cancelled, the alumni cast is asked for help by an alien species in order to save the universe.

programme.title: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider, (2001, Action)
programme.desc: Exploring lost empires and finding priceless treasures... it's all in a day's work for Lara Croft. Though, a secret from her father's past is about to lead Lara to her greatest challenge.

programme.title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: Cradle of Life, (2003, Adventure)
programme.desc: Lara Croft sets out on a quest to save Pandora's box from landing into the wrong hands. Join her as she races through furious hand-to-hand battles, blazing shoot-outs and breathtaking sky-diving escapes to try to save the ancient artifact.

programme.title: Dungeons & Dragons: Honor Among Thieves, (2023, Science fiction)
programme.desc: A charming thief and a band of unlikely adventurers undertake an epic heist to retrieve a lost relic. Still, things go dangerously awry when they run afoul of the wrong people in this hilarious and action-packed adventure.

programme.title: Saving Private Ryan, (1998, Action)
programme.desc: A World War II captain (Tom Hanks) and his squad (Edward Burns, Tom Sizemore) risk all to locate and send home a soldier whose three brothers died in combat.

programme.title: The Wolf of Wall Street, (2013, Drama)
programme.desc: Sex. Money. Power. Drugs. Brace yourself for a true story from legendary filmmaker Martin Scorsese. Leonardo DiCaprio stars as a young stockbroker hungry for a life of non-stop thrills, where corruption was king and more was never enough.

programme.title: The Big Short, (2015, Comedy)
programme.desc: Based on the true story of four outsiders who saw what the big banks, media, and government refused to: the global collapse of the economy. A bold investment leads them into the dark underbelly of banking, where everyone and everything is in question.

programme.title: The Wolf of Wall Street, (2013, Drama)
programme.desc: Sex. Money. Power. Drugs. Brace yourself for a true story from legendary filmmaker Martin Scorsese. Leonardo DiCaprio stars as a young stockbroker hungry for a life of non-stop thrills, where corruption was king and more was never enough.

programme.title: The Big Short, (2015, Comedy)
programme.desc: Based on the true story of four outsiders who saw what the big banks, media, and government refused to: the global collapse of the economy. A bold investment leads them into the dark underbelly of banking, where everyone and everything is in question.

programme.title: The Wolf of Wall Street, (2013, Drama)
programme.desc: Sex. Money. Power. Drugs. Brace yourself for a true story from legendary filmmaker Martin Scorsese. Leonardo DiCaprio stars as a young stockbroker hungry for a life of non-stop thrills, where corruption was king and more was never enough.

programme.title: Evil Dead II, (1987, Horror)
programme.desc: Ash, the sole survivor of THE EVIL DEAD, returns to the same cabin in the woods and again unleashes the dead. With his girlfriend possessed and his body parts running amok, Ash must again single-handedly battle the damned in this unhinged horror classic!

programme.title: Amityville 3-D, (1983, Horror)
programme.desc: A reporter moves into the ominous Long Island house to debunk it of the recent supernatural events but is instead besieged by the evil manifestations of a demon-from-hell lurking in the basement.

programme.title: Night of the Comet, (1984, Thriller)
programme.desc: A huge comet passes near the earth, vaporizing nearly the whole planet. But a few partially exposed people are now blood-thirsty zombies, and they begin a hunt for the remaining humans.

programme.title: The War of the Worlds, (1953, Classic Sci-Fi & Fantasy)
programme.desc: Gene Barry and Ann Robinson are among the humans intrigued when a meteor-like object crashes to Earth … but its occupants are definitely not friendly.

programme.title: Barbarella, (1968, Science fiction)
programme.desc: The setting is the planet Lythion in the year 40,000, when Barbarella makes a forced landing while traveling through space. She vanquishes evil in the forms of robots and monsters. She also rewards the handsome men who assist her in the adventure.

programme.title: Mad Max, (1980, Action)
programme.desc: Max and the gang's worlds converge when the gang wants Max as badly as he wants them, especially after they target him for the death of their former leader.

programme.title: Popeye, (1980, Comedy)
programme.desc: The legendary, beloved anvil-armed sailor of the seven seas comes magically to life in this delightful musical, starring Robin Williams as Popeye, who meets all challenges with the unshakable philosophy, "I yam what I yam and that's all that I yam."

programme.title: Earth Girls Are Easy, (1988, Comedy)
programme.desc: Three aliens (Jim Carrey, Damon Wayans, and Jeff Goldblum) crash-land in Los Angeles' San Fernando Valley. A manicurist (Geena Davis) and her boss (the wacky Julie Brown) befriend the threesome, give them makeovers and show them the town.

programme.title: Cutthroat Island, (1995, Super Swashbucklers)
programme.desc: A female pirate and her companion race against their rivals to find a hidden island that contains a fabulous treasure.

programme.title: The Wolf of Snow Hollow, (2020, Werewolves)
programme.desc: A small-town sheriff and his lackluster team of officers must solve a series of brutal murders that are occurring on the full moon. As he's consumed by the hunt for the killer, he struggles to remind himself that there's no such thing as werewolves…

programme.title: Mom And Dad, (2018, Horror)
programme.desc: A teenage girl and her little brother must survive a wild 24 hours during which a mass hysteria of unknown origins causes parents to turn violently on their own kids.

programme.title: Scouts Guide To The Zombie Apocalypse, (2015, Zombies)
programme.desc: When their peaceful town is ravaged by a zombie invasion, three scouts and one badass cocktail waitress will fight for the badge of a lifetime and put their scouting skills to the test to save mankind from the undead.

programme.title: The Babadook, (2014, Horror)
programme.desc: In this terrifying thriller, a mother must protect her son from an evil, supernatural entity that has escaped the pages of a children's book and is lurking in their home.

programme.title: I Saw the TV Glow, (2024, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: Introduced to a mysterious late-night TV show—a vision of a secret, supernatural world beneath his life in the suburbs—teenage Owen's reality begins to crack. A once-in-a-generation horror from Jane Schoenbrun.

programme.title: Terrifier, (2018, Horror)
programme.desc: Art The Clown sets his sights on three young women, along with anyone else that gets in his way.

programme.title: Terrifier 2, (2022, Horror)
programme.desc: After being resurrected by a sinister entity, Art the Clown returns to Miles County where he begins to target a teenage girl and her younger brother on Halloween.

programme.title: Terrifier 3, (2024, Horror)
programme.desc: Art the Clown is set to unleash chaos on the unsuspecting residents of Miles County as they peacefully drift off to sleep on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Winnie-the-Pooh: Blood and Honey, (2022, Horror)
programme.desc: Winnie-The-Pooh: Blood and Honey follows Pooh and Piglet as they go on a rampage after Christopher Robin abandons them.

programme.title: Witness, (1985, Action)
programme.desc: When a young Amish woman and her son get caught up in the murder of an undercover narcotic's agent, their saviour turns out to be hardened Philadelphia detective John Book.

programme.title: Next of Kin, (1989, Action)
programme.desc: When policeman Truman Gates' younger brother is murdered by the mob, Gates is torn between his desire to uphold the law and his lust for revenge. But Gates' older brother will not be satisfied until every member of the Chicago mob is dead.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction, (1987, Crime)
programme.desc: Michael Douglas plays Dan, a New York attorney who has a tryst with seductive Alex Forrest while his wife is away. Dan later shrugs off the affair as a mistake and considers it over. But Alex won't be ignored. Not now, not tomorrow, not ever.

programme.title: Witness, (1985, Action)
programme.desc: When a young Amish woman and her son get caught up in the murder of an undercover narcotic's agent, their saviour turns out to be hardened Philadelphia detective John Book.

programme.title: Hamburger Hill, (1987, War)
programme.desc: On the 11th May 1969, troops of the 101st airborne division engaged the enemy at the base of Hill 937 in the Ashau Valley. Ten days and eleven bloody assaults later, the troops who fought there called it Hamburger Hill.

programme.title: Young Guns, (1988, Western)
programme.desc: In a lawless and violent time, six young outcasts are hired by an English merchant as 'regulators' to guard his ranch against the mob, a corrupt and powerful ring.

programme.title: Young Guns II, (1990, Western)
programme.desc: The West has changed since The Regulators last rode through. Cornered by the ruthless cattle kings and double-crossed by corrupt government officials, Billy the Kid leads the Regulators down a treacherous trail towards Old Mexico… and destiny.

programme.title: Harriet the Spy, (1996, Comedy)
programme.desc: Harriet M. Welsch is probably the world’s most accomplished 11-year-old spy. Harriet dreams of being a writer, and her nanny and best friend, Golly, told her to start by writing down everything she sees.

programme.title: Wayne's World, (1992, Comedy)
programme.desc: When a sleazy TV exec offers Wayne and Garth a contract to tape their late-night cable-access show at his network, they discover the road to the big time is full of gnarly twists and turns.

programme.title: Wayne's World 2, (1993, Comedy)
programme.desc: Having achieved godlike status as a late-night TV personality, Wayne now confronts the question that has plagued man for centuries: Is there life after cable?

programme.title: Evolution, (2001, Science fiction)
programme.desc: A firefighting cadet, two college professors, and a geeky-but-sexy government scientist work against an alien organism that has been rapidly evolving ever since its arrival on Earth inside a meteor.

programme.title: Good Burger, (1997, Comedy)
programme.desc: Kel are serving up laughs! They're the good guys in Good Burger, a zany comedy inspired by the popular Kel routine from Nickelodeon's hit series All That.

programme.desc: A charismatic jeweler (Adam Sandler) makes a high-stakes bet that could lead to the windfall of a lifetime.

programme.title: Dreamland, (2021, Crime)
programme.desc: Discovering a fugitive bank robber (Margot Robbie) is hiding in his small town, a young man is torn between claiming the bounty on her head and his growing attraction to the seductive criminal, in this epic love story set during the Great Depression.

programme.title: Pain & Gain, (2013, Crime)
programme.desc: When an ambitious group of personal trainers go after the American Dream, they get caught up in a criminal enterprise that goes horribly wrong. Now, living large will take everything they've got in this unbelievable and outrageous true story.

programme.title: Runaway Jury, (2003, Thriller)
programme.desc: A jury fixer plays a deadly cat-and-mouse game with a jury member and a mysterious outsider who both offer to 'deliver' the verdict to the highest bidder. Soon, lives and millions of dollars are at stake in this pulse-pounder filled with twists and turns.

programme.desc: Discovering a fugitive bank robber (Margot Robbie) is hiding in his small town, a young man is torn between claiming the bounty on her head and his growing attraction to the seductive criminal, in this epic love story set during the Great Depression.

programme.title: Pain & Gain, (2013, Crime)
programme.desc: When an ambitious group of personal trainers go after the American Dream, they get caught up in a criminal enterprise that goes horribly wrong. Now, living large will take everything they've got in this unbelievable and outrageous true story.

programme.title: Super 8, (2011, Adventure)
programme.desc: In the summer of 1979, a group of friends in a small Ohio town witness a catastrophic train crash while making a Super 8 movie and soon suspect that it was not an accident.

programme.title: Arrival, (2016, Science fiction)
programme.desc: When mysterious spacecraft touch down across the globe, an elite team - led by expert translator Louise Banks (Academy Award® nominee Amy Adams) – races against time to decipher their intent.

programme.title: Source Code, (2011, Thriller)
programme.desc: Jake Gyllenhaal stars in this action thriller about a man who awakens in another man’s body to discover only he has the ability to stop a terrorist attack on a commuter train.

programme.title: Super 8, (2011, Adventure)
programme.desc: In the summer of 1979, a group of friends in a small Ohio town witness a catastrophic train crash while making a Super 8 movie and soon suspect that it was not an accident.

programme.title: Arrival, (2016, Science fiction)
programme.desc: When mysterious spacecraft touch down across the globe, an elite team - led by expert translator Louise Banks (Academy Award® nominee Amy Adams) – races against time to decipher their intent.

programme.title: Bound, (1995, Thriller)
programme.desc: Caesar’s a guy who launders money for the mob. What’s the last thing that would come between a sleazy wise guy like Caesar and that money? A couple of women with brains to die for and bodies to match.

programme.title: Seven Psychopaths, (2012, Dark Humor & Black Comedies)
programme.desc: A struggling screenwriter inadvertently becomes entangled in the Los Angeles criminal underworld after his oddball friends kidnap a gangster's beloved Shih Tzu.

programme.title: Better Luck Tomorrow, (2003, Thriller)
programme.desc: To his classmates and teachers, high-schooler Ben Manibag appears to be the model student: a perfectionist and overachiever. But underneath this persona is a darker side. Ben and his bored high-school buddies lead double lives.

programme.title: Face/Off, (1997, Action)
programme.desc: As a result of a new medical technique, an agent is able to surgically take on the identical appearance of a criminal in order to take down his terrorist organization.

programme.title: The Big Hit, (1998, Action)
programme.desc: Lou Diamond Phillips, Mark Wahlberg, Christina Applegate, Antonio Sabato Jr. and Lela Rochon star in this story of a hitman who kidnaps the teenage child of his boss.

programme.title: Pulp Fiction, (1994, Thriller)
programme.desc: Writer-director Quentin Tarantino delivers an iconic cast of characters in PULP FICTION, a wildly entertaining tale of violence and redemption. John Travolta, Samuel L. Jackson, Uma Thurman, and Bruce Willis star in this pop culture phenomenon.

programme.title: Face/Off, (1997, Action)
programme.desc: As a result of a new medical technique, an agent is able to surgically take on the identical appearance of a criminal in order to take down his terrorist organization.

programme.title: Total Recall, (1990, Thriller)
programme.desc: It's 2084 A.D. and Doug Quaid is haunted by recurring dreams about journeying to Earths closest planetary neighbor, Mars.

programme.title: The Phantom, (1996, Action Comedies)
programme.desc: The story begins as an expedition lands on the island of Bengalla, seeking the Skulls of Touganda. Believed to harness an energy force of power, they could spell disaster for mankind.

programme.title: Braveheart, (1995, Action)
programme.desc: William Wallace, a commoner, unites the 13th Century Scots in their battle to overthrow English rule.

programme.title: Little Big Man, (1970, Western)
programme.desc: From director Arthur Penn (BONNIE AND CLYDE), Dustin Hoffman, Chief Dan George, Faye Dunaway, Martin Balsam, Jeff Corey and Richard Mulligan star in a genre-defying tale of an alleged 121-year-old white survivor of Custer's Last Stand.

programme.title: The Return Of A Man Called Horse, (1976, Western)
programme.desc: Richard Harris stars in this superior sequel which follows the plight of a horribly wronged tribe of Sioux Indians and the white man who would join in their revenge.

programme.title: Rio Lobo, (1970, Western)
programme.desc: This fifth and final collaboration between John Wayne and director Howard Hawks is an action-filled Western set after the Civil War, in which a group of men seek out Union traitors responsible for a string of train robbers.

programme.title: The Shootist, (1976, Western)
programme.desc: Afflicted with a terminal illness, John Bernard Books, the last of the legendary gunfighters, quietly returns to Carson City for medical attention from his old friend Dr. Hostetler.

programme.title: Breakheart Pass, (1975, Western)
programme.desc: As a train races through the Rocky Mountains, the passengers are being murdered! The only hope is John Deakin (Charles Bronson) who uncovers a secret that explodes in a torrent of shocking revelations, explosive brawls, and blazing gun battles.

programme.title: Death Wish, (1974, Action)
programme.desc: In this explosive story of revenge and urban violence, Charles Bronson plays Paul Kersey, a bleeding-heart liberal who has a change of opinion after his wife and daughter are violently attacked by a gang of thugs in their apartment.

programme.title: White Lightning, (1973, Action)
programme.desc: In one of his most memorable roles, Burt Reynolds portrays a moonshine whiskey runner who turns state's witness to avenge the murder of a boy no one understood.

programme.title: Gator, (1976, Action)
programme.desc: The Feds want Gator McKlusky (Burt Reynolds) to go undercover to expose a local crime boss and former boyhood pal, Bama McCall. When Gator discovers Bama is involved in extortion, prostitution, and murder, the suspense builds to an explosive climax!

programme.title: Rolling Thunder, (1977, Action)
programme.desc: William Devane and Tommy Lee Jones star as two former P.O.W.s out for revenge in this neo-noir action-thriller that Quentin Tarantino cites as one of his favorite films. Written by genre masters Paul Schrader and Heywood Gould. John Flynn directs.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: A Matter of Trust
programme.desc: Zuzu’s on the run from Sector Security, but can a little help from some little friends help her avoid big trouble?

programme.desc: The Friendship Cup heats up as Yugo and Celina tear through the tricky twists and turns of a transforming duel track!

programme.desc: Yugo’s in for a bumpy ride as he’s forced to zigzag his way across a duel track that’s been mapped for mayhem by Roget!

programme.desc: With the City on the edge of their seats, a new champion is about to be crowned! But who will sit in the winner’s circle: Yuya or Jack?

programme.desc: The Friendship Cup may be over, but trouble sure isn’t! Roget is planning to take Zuzu to Duel Academy!

programme.desc: Yuya's been transported to a strange new world that's been decimated by Duel Academy!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: While Yuya learns troubling news about his dad in one dimension, Zuzu is on the run against Duel Academy in another!

programme.desc: Yuya stumbles across one of Duel Academy's most dangerous duelists… and his dad's #1 enemy!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Yuya and the gang have been shanghaied by a corrupt captain working for The Professor!

programme.title: Otama's temperature is going up and Luffy has no time to waste! However, Hawkins, one of Kaido's Headliners, blocks their way by showing his unique powers and skills which can harm his own men.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Headliner! Hawkins the Magician Appears!

programme.title: Luffy and Zoro have been stalled by Hawkins but their fortune looks bright as they are guided by a woman who Zoro had saved. She leads them to a teahouse and to an herbal remedy for the river poison.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Defeat is Inevitable! The Strawman's Fierce Attack!

programme.title: Otama's life is saved by Otsuru at her teahouse. The proud Otama finds it hard to take more kindness. The group learns of the Okobore Town - living on the cast-offs of the officials! Then, suddenly, they were attacked by the Shogun's men!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Greatest Day of My Life! Otama and Her Sweet Red-bean Soup!

programme.title: Otama has been kidnapped by the Gifters! She is taken to a flourishing town called Bakura Town where a creepy-looking Headliner was expecting her. Luffy and Zoro rush to rescue her along with a samurai, Okiku!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Charging into the Enemy's Territory! Bakura Town - Where Officials Thrive!

programme.title: As Luffy, Zoro, and Okiku bounce through Bakura Town on Komachiyo's back, a sumo wrestler comes flying towards them! Interested, they go down to watch sumo but the undefeated yokozuna Urashima has been expecting Okiku there.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Yokozuna Appears! The Invincible Urashima Goes After Okiku!

programme.title: Luffy challenges Urashima, the strongest yokozuna in the Land of Wano, to a sumo match! Urashima even uses illegal moves to beat Luffy at any cost! Meanwhile, Holdem tells Otama that he knows she committed a crime and he has to punish her for it.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Climactic Sumo Battle! Straw Hat vs. the Strongest Ever Yokozuna!

programme.title: After sending the yokozuna Urashima flying, Luffy and his clan continue their search for Bakura Town's boss to save Otama! They finally find the boss, Holdem, one of the Beast Pirates' Headliners.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Luffy Rages! Rescue Otama from Danger!

programme.title: Facing Holdem who is holding Otama as hostage, Luffy prepares for a fight but Okiku tries to stop him by sharing who is really ruling the region. Meanwhile, Basil Hawkins is confronted by a mysterious figure.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Taking Back Otama! A Fierce Fight Against Holdem!

programme.title: Taking down Holdem, Luffy rescues Otama and tries to catch up to Zoro and Okiku who stole the food treasure ship and started a mad dash to get out of the town!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Duel! The Magician and the Surgeon of Death!

programme.title: This is a story of Luffy in an alternate reality. While sailing on the sea by himself, a strange bird crashes into his small boat. He looks up to find a giant ship where a girl named Ann has been captured. It seems like the bird belongs to her.
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Zoro and the others dash out of BakuraTown on the treasure ship filled with food! Luffy catches up to them bringing ahuge bucket of fresh water! Then, they distribute the food and the water to thepeople of Okobore Town who were thirsty and hungry.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Coming of the Treasure Ship! LuffytaroReturns the Favor!

programme.title: Luffy arrives at the ruins of Oden Castle following Law and finds the graves of his friends, Kin'emon and the others. As Law starts telling the already-stunned Luffy about the creepy story of Kin'emon's ghost, Luffy sees it coming towards him!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Mysterious Grave Markers! A Reunion at the Ruins of Oden Castle!

programme.title: Kin'emon tells Luffy and the others about how Kozuki Oden made Kuri into a peaceful region and became its Daimyo. However, he was set up by Kaido and Kurozumi Orochi and executed.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Legendary Samurai! The Man Who Roger Admired!

programme.title: Kin'emon and the others crossed through time by the power of Kozuki Toki, Momonosuke's mother, and arrived at the Land of Wano 20 years later, a totally different country before their eyes.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Bringing Down the Emperor of the Sea! A Secret Raid Operation Begins!

programme.title: Ashura Doji, one of the allies Kin'emon wants to search for, has become the head of a thieves brigade and they now raid Okobore Town taking away the food that Luffy gave to the people.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Strongest Man in the World! Shutenmaru, the Thieves Brigade Chief!

programme.title: The drunken Kaido flies above Okobore Town in his dragon form and threatens Shutenmaru and all the people in the town. Luffy, Law, Kin'emon, and Okiku start running towards the town to rescue them.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Everyone is Annihilated! Kaido's Furious Blast Breath!

programme.title: After Luffy sees Kaido shattering the ruins of Oden Castle where he left his friends, he becomes enraged and attacks Kaido! Soon after, he finds out Kaido even assaulted Otama who was riding on Speed's back to her home.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Finally Clashing! The Ferocious Luffy vs. Kaido!

programme.title: An infuriated Luffy strikes blow after blow on the drunken Kaido. When he activates Gear Four Bounce-Man and launches even more powerful attacks, Kaido fights back and knocks him out with just one blow.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Destructive! One Shot, One Kill – Thunder Bagua!

programme.title: Luffy gets beaten by Kaido and is sent to a great mine where prisoners are made to work in forced labor. There, he finds an unexpected reunion. Meanwhile, Okiku is rushing to the ruins of Oden Castle.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Living Hell! Luffy, Humiliated in the Great Mine!

programme.title: On Gloom Island in the Grand Line, Perona finds out that her captain, Gecko Moria, is alive and she is about to leave Dracule Mihawk who let her stay there for the last two years. Meanwhile,
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Holyland in Tumult! Emperor of the Sea Blackbeard Cackles!

programme.title: Dogstorm fights against Shutenmaru to ally with him for their operation but Shutenmaru still rejects their call.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: It's On! The Special Operation to Bring Down Kaido!

programme.title: In the Excavation Labor Camp, Luffy competes against Kid by hauling stones for food and they both get tons of it. However, Dobon, a vice warden, becomes furious when he finds out all their provisions are gone, and gives Luffy and Kid a new sentence.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Rampage! The Prisoners – Luffy and Kid!

programme.title: Sanji's Special Soba becomes very popular but some gang members come to disturb his business and knock over a customer's bowl. Infuriated, Sanji takes them down and gives the customer, a little girl named Toko.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Great Sensation! Sanji's Special Soba!

programme.title: Wano's top courtesan Komurasaki is in procession and slowly makes her way to Orochi Palace. There is a crowd of people on the street as well as Sanji and the others. While everyone is fascinated by her, some seeking vengeance get in the Oiran's way.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Luxurious and Gorgeous! Wano's Most Beautiful Woman – Komurasaki!

programme.title: Zoro who has been wandering around the Land of Wano since he got separated from his friends meets a sycophant named Tonoyasu. Tonoyasu paid for Zoro's sushi and to pay him back, Zoro gambles at dice.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Tale of Chivalry! Zoro and Tonoyasu's Little Trip!

programme.title: Zoro is taken to the sycophant Tonoyasu's poor hometown, Ebisu Town where people laugh away their misfortune.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A State of Emergency! Big Mom Closes in!

programme.title: As the Big Mom Pirates approach the Land of Wano, Kaido's subordinates led by King and Queen try to get rid of them.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Capital in an Uproar! Another Assassin Targets Sanji!

programme.title: Sanji faces Page One, a Headliner of the Animal Kingdom Pirates, who questions the soba cook's true identity. Sanji uses Germa's device for the first time and transforms himself into Stealth Black while dubbing himself Soba Mask.
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: While the banquet grows livelier at Orochi's Castle, Robin is confronted by his ninja force called Oniwabanshu. In the meanwhile in Kuri, Chopper, Tama, and Momonosuke train themselves preparing for the incoming battle.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Desperate Situation! Orochi's Menacing Oniwabanshu!

programme.title: At the banquet, the Shogun Orochi starts to talk about his late old enemy which bores the attendees. Suddenly, the Oiran's child attendant Toko bursts with laughter and won't stop. Orochi becomes furious and attacks her.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Pandemonium! The Monster Snake, Shogun Orochi!

programme.title: In order to save her child attendant Toko, the top Oiran Komurasaki stands up to the Shogun Orochi, but the yakuza boss Kyoshiro interrupts and does something that no one expected.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Flower Falls! The Final Moment of the Most Beautiful Woman in the Land of Wano!

programme.title: Nami, Robin, and the others got away from Oden's Castle and now discuss what they have found out about the enemy so far. Meanwhile, Chopper's group sets off to rescue Luffy from the Excavation Labor Camp.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Bond Between Prisoners! Luffy and Old Man Hyo!

programme.title: At the Excavation Labor Camp in Udon, Luffy tries to save Old Man Hyo and stands up to Vice Warden Daifuku and Warden Babanuki with his physical strength weakened by the Sea Prism Stone cuffs.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Lead Performer! Queen the Plague Emerges!

programme.title: Deep Impact, (1998, Science fiction)
programme.desc: When a couple of young astronomers discover an enormous comet on course to collide with Earth, the countdown to doomsday begins, and the human race embarks on the fight for survival.

programme.title: Frank Miller's Sin City, (2005, Comic Books and Superheroes)
programme.desc: In these intertwined tales, a universe of unlikely and reluctant heroes try to do the right thing in a city that refuses to care.

programme.title: Snowpiercer, (2014, Action)
programme.desc: After a failed global-warming experiment, a post-apocalyptic Ice Age has killed off nearly all life on the planet.

programme.title: Attack the Block, (2011, Science fiction)
programme.desc: ATTACK THE BLOCK is a fast, funny, frightening action adventure movie that pits a teen street gang against an invasion of savage alien monsters. It turns a crazy mix of tough street kids into a team of kick ass heroes.

programme.title: Deep Impact, (1998, Science fiction)
programme.desc: When a couple of young astronomers discover an enormous comet on course to collide with Earth, the countdown to doomsday begins, and the human race embarks on the fight for survival.

programme.title: Minority Report, (2002, Action)
programme.desc: In the future, a division of the police department has the technology to arrest killers before they commit crimes; however, the tables turn on one of the cops working within the division.

programme.title: Face/Off, (1997, Action)
programme.desc: As a result of a new medical technique, an agent is able to surgically take on the identical appearance of a criminal in order to take down his terrorist organization.

programme.title: John Sturges' The Hallelujah Trail, (1965, Western)
programme.desc: Chaos reigns on the wide open plains as a host of stars, including Burt Lancaster and Lee Remick, have their eyes set on a shipment of whiskey and let loose in this wild comedy that spoofs nearly every convention of movie westerns.

programme.title: Buffalo Bill And The Indians, (1976, Western)
programme.desc: Buffalo Bill has fought Indians & Civil War battles, but nothing can prepare him for show business! When he signs Sitting Bull for a role in his Wild West Show, the clash of cultures reverberates far beyond the boundaries of their sprawling theater.

programme.title: The Hills Run Red, (1967, Western)
programme.desc: A man recently released from a five-year prison sentence seeks vengeance against the former friend who has violated his trust and sought his death. Starring Thomas Hunter, Henry Silva, and Dan Duryea.

programme.title: Terror In A Texas Town, (1958, Western)
programme.desc: A greedy financier and a gang of gunmen force people to sell land.

programme.title: Gunslinger, (1956, Western)
programme.desc: When the town marshal is gunned down, his wife Rose (Beverly Garland) dons his badge. But now an evil dancehall diva (Allison Hayes) wants her dead and hires a gunslinger (John Ireland), who agrees to kill Rose...until he falls in love with her!

programme.title: The King And Four Queens, (1956, Western)
programme.desc: Clark Gable is a smooth as ever in this unique blend of action, comedy and western intrigue as he romances the stunning Eleanor Parker -- and three other women -- in the hopes that one of them knows the location of a hidden cache of stolen gold.

programme.title: Hour Of The Gun, (1967, Western)
programme.desc: Director John Sturges presents a reworking of the Wyatt Earp/Doc Holliday legend and the struggle for political control of Tombstone, with a marvelous trio of antagonists: James Garner as Earp, Jason Robards as Holliday, and Robert Ryan as Clanton.

programme.title: Support Your Local Sheriff!, (1969, Western)
programme.desc: James Garner stars in this rollicking western spoof that has him taking on the job of a frontier town sheriff who must fend off villains (led by Walter Brennen) from every direction...all without breaking a sweat or dirtying his shiny black boots!

programme.title: Support Your Local Gunfighter, (1971, Western)
programme.desc: James Garner is back in the saddle again as hustler Latigo Smith whose latest con is passing off cowhand Jug (Jack Elam) as the dreaded gunman Swifty Morgan. But when the real Swifty shows up, the Wild West is going to get a whole lot wackier!

programme.title: Disturbia, (2007, Drama)
programme.desc: Living under three months' house arrest, Kale Brecht (Shia LaBeouf, Transformers) passes his days spying on the neighbors. It's all fun and games until things take a horrifying turn for the worse.

programme.title: Eagle Eye, (2008, Action)
programme.desc: Shia LaBeouf and Michelle Monaghan star as two strangers trying to escape danger when they are ripped from their ordinary lives and 'activated' as part of a hightech assassination plot.

programme.title: A.I. Artificial Intelligence, (2001, Science fiction)
programme.desc: In a future world, humans share aspects of their lives with companion robots called Mechas. But when an advanced prototype robot child named David is programmed to show unconditional love, his human family isn't prepared for the consequences.

programme.title: Disturbia, (2007, Drama)
programme.desc: Living under three months' house arrest, Kale Brecht (Shia LaBeouf, Transformers) passes his days spying on the neighbors. It's all fun and games until things take a horrifying turn for the worse.

programme.title: RV, (2006, Comedy)
programme.desc: A forced family vacation in a recreational vehicle rapidly turns into a disaster.

programme.title: The Longest Yard, (2005, Comedy)
programme.desc: The story of a pro quarterback and former college champion and coach are asked to put together a football team of inmates to take on the guards while doing their time in prison.

programme.title: Old School, (2003, Screwball)
programme.desc: Three men are disenchanted with life and try to recapture their college days.

programme.title: The communities join forces to restore a bridge that will facilitate communication and trade; someone is gravely injured at the construction site.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Rick is forced to face the past as he struggles to maintain the safety of the communities and protect the future he and Carl envisioned.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The survivors encounter unfamiliar faces outside the safety of their community's walls and must decide whether this new group can be trusted.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Carol seeks out an old friend living alone in a wilderness teeming with walkers; survivors make the perilous trek to a new home.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: A small rescue mission braves a dangerous herd in their hunt for a missing comrade, only to discover a surprising threat that could doom them all.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The communities thought they could build a better future separately, but the recent loss of one of their own drives them to band together; new leaders rise when a disturbing and dangerous threat is unmasked; an escaped captive revisits his past.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: A new arrival at the Hilltop opens up about the leader of a group of mask-wearing savages; a search party sets out on a daring mission to find two missing friends.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The savage group led by Alpha confronts the Hilltop in a harrowing attempt to retrieve her daughter; a supply run for the Kingdom turns into a dangerous quest.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: While one community struggles to ease tensions that threaten to divide from within, the true nature of another group comes into focus; a mission to rescue a friend has deadly consequences.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Daryl's daring rescue mission forces Alpha to unleash a group of her own to retrieve what belongs to her, even if the price is paid in blood; the Kingdom's plans to reunite the communities are put in jeopardy.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: An outsider's arrival forces Alexandria to rehash devastating old wounds; eye-opening secrets from the past are revealed.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The fair at the Kingdom is underway, with all four communities coming together in celebration for the first time in years; while some pacts are renewed, other deals will come at a much steeper price.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: In the aftermath of an overwhelming loss, the communities must brave a ferocious blizzard; as one group deals with an enemy from within, another is forced to make a life or death decision.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The group in Oceanside continues to train in case the Whisperers return; tensions are high as the heroes struggle to hold onto their concept of civilization.

programme.title: The threat of the Whisperers return leads to paranoia sweeping over Alexandria; in the meantime, Carol battles with the need for revenge.

programme.desc: Usagi and the others try to figure out the identity of Chibi-Usa, the mysterious girl who fell from the sky.

programme.desc: Usagi and the others try to locate Ami and Rei. Seeing this, Mamoru's underclassman Ittou Asanuma demands to know Makoto's identity.

programme.desc: Minako sneaks into a channeling session to communicate with people in other dimensions and learns the channeler is Calaveras the Medium!

programme.desc: Usagi and her friends' peace is short-lived when a strange phenomenon that turns people into monsters begins plaguing the city.

programme.title: Clube da Luta, (1999)

programme.title: Los Angeles: Cidade Proibida, (1997)
programme.desc: 1997. À medida que a corrupção cresce na Los Angeles dos anos 50, três policiais - um rigoroso, outro brutal e outro sórdido - investigam uma série de assassinatos com seu próprio estilo de justiça. Gêneros: Thriller Elenco: Kevin Spacey, Russell Crowe, Guy Pearce, James Cromwell, Kim Basinger Diretor: Curtis Hanson

programme.title: A Vingança de John Henry, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. Quando duas crianças imigrantes que fogem de seu exlíder de gangue, tropeçam em sua vida, John é forçado a se reconciliar com seu passado para tentar darlhes um futuro. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Terry Crews, Ludacris, Maestro Harrell, Kimberly Hebert Gregory, Ken Foree, Gerald Slink Johnson, Dohn Norwood, Tyler Alvarez, Jamila Velazquez, Josep... Diretor: Will Forbes, William Forbes

programme.title: Dose dupla, (2013)
programme.desc: 2013. Dois agentes especiais precisam se unir contra um cartel de drogas mexicano depois que uma operação secreta acaba gerando resultados catastróficos. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Denzel Washington, Mark Wahlberg, Paula Patton Diretor: Baltasar Kormákur

programme.title: Cidade Fantasma, (2003)
programme.desc: 2003. Um vigarista que está foragido da polícia nos EUA viaja para o Camboja para receber sua parte em um golpe de seguro, mas descobre mais do que esperava. Agora, ele terá que usar sua habilidade criminosa para realizar um plano ousado e sair dessa. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Matt Dillon, James Caan, Natascha McElhone, Gérard Depardieu, Stellan Skarsgård, Rose Byrne, Shawn Andrews, Christopher Curry, Pok Panhavicyetr, Leo F... Diretor: Matt Dillon

programme.title: Redenção, (2013)
programme.desc: 2013. Um veterano de guerra assume uma nova identidade enquanto tenta se vingar dos assassinos de sua namorada grávida. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Jason Statham, Agata Buzek, Vicky McClure Diretor: Steven Knight

programme.title: Aposta Máxima, (2013)
programme.desc: 2013. Estudante acredita que foi enganado e vai à Costa Rica enfrentar magnata. Gêneros: Thriller Elenco: Justin Timberlake, Gemma Arterton, Anthony Mackie, Christian George, Yul Vazquez, Ben Affleck, Michael Esper, Oliver Cooper, John Heard, James Molina Diretor: Brad Furman

programme.title: Ameaça Explosiva, (2016)
programme.desc: 2016. Depois de uma ameaça de bomba, dois especialistas do FBI mergulham em um jogo mortal de gato e rato com um criminoso, correndo desesperadamente contra o tempo para descobrir o verdadeiro objetivo do homem-bomba, enquanto lutam para salvar sua cidade. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Julia Benson, Adam Joseph Copeland, Erica Carroll, Mitchell Kummen, Patrick Sabongui, C.j. Perry, Michael Rogers Diretor: Stephen Reynolds

programme.title: Crash - No Limite, (2005)
programme.desc: 2005. Vidas em Los Angeles se cruzam em uma reflexão sobre racismo, perda e redenção. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Sandra Bullock, Don Cheadle, Matt Dillon, Michael Peña, Jennifer Esposito, Brendan Fraser, Nona Gaye, Terrence Howard, Ludacris, Thandiwe Newton Diretor: Paul Haggis

programme.desc: 1998. Quando ainda era criança, Danny ajudou Anna Swann, a filha da vizinha, a nascer. Apesar de vários relacionamentos, ele sempre achou que seu destino era se casar com ela. Anos depois, ele volta para sua cidade natal determinado a realizar seu sonho. Gêneros: Romance Elenco: Jude Law, Jennifer Tilly, Gretchen Mol, Martha Plimpton, Brenda Blethyn, Jon Tenney, Jeremy Piven, Vincent Laresca, Jane Adams, Bruce Jarchow Diretor: Charlie Peters

programme.title: A Noite da Realeza, (2015)
programme.desc: 2015. Enquanto a Europa celebra o Dia V-E em 1945 (a rendição incondicional da Alemanha nazista na Segunda Guerra Mundial), as princesas adolescentes Elizabeth e Margaret passam uma noite agitada em Londres. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Rupert Everett, Sarah Gadon Diretor: Julian Jarrold

programme.title: Tudo acontece em Elizabethtown, (2005)
programme.desc: 2005. Drew Baylor é designer que, em um belo dia, tem sua vida jogada de pernas para o alto. A caminho de Elizabethtow, Drew conhece Claire. Ela é bonita e decidiu acompanhar Drew em sua jornada de volta para casa. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Orlando Bloom, Kirsten Dunst, Susan Sarandon, Alec Baldwin, Jessica Biel, Judy Greer, Bruce McGill, Paul Schneider, Loudon Wainwright III, Paula Deen Diretor: Cameron Crowe

programme.title: Chocolate Covered Christmas, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. Sadie, uma executiva de marketing de sucesso, é filha dos donos de uma tradicional loja de chocolates. Ao decidir passar o Natal com a família, descobre que seus pais planejam vender a loja, colocando em risco seu sonho de um dia herdá-la. Gêneros: Children & Family Elenco: Jason Burkey, Malone Thomas Diretor: Paul Sandra Martin

programme.title: Identical Love, (2021)
programme.desc: 2021. Depois de ter sido abandonada ao altar, uma médica é voluntária no estrangeiro e descobre que o gémeo de seu ex-noivo também lá está. Gêneros: Romance Elenco: Shae Robins, Shona Kay, Mason D. Davis, Scott Christopher Diretor: Brian Brough

programme.title: A Viagem, (2012)
programme.desc: 2012. Uma exploração de como as ações de vidas individuais impactam umas às outras no passado, presente e futuro, como uma alma vai de assassino a herói, e um ato de bondade se espalha ao longo dos séculos para inspirar uma revolução. Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: Tom Hanks, Halle Berry, Susan Sarandon, Hugh Grant Diretor: Tom Tywe, Lana Wachowski

programme.title: O Lago dos Tubarões, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. Meredith Hernandez é uma jovem mãe e agente policial de uma cidade perto do pacífico Lago Tahoe. Quando uma série de ataques de tubarões provocou o pânico na cidade, ela e um perito em tubarões decidiram investigar os estranhos incidentes. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Dolph Lundgren, Danny Roth, Sara Lane Diretor: Jerry Dugan

programme.title: Macaco Vs. Máquina, (2023)
programme.desc: 2023. Reconhecendo o poder destrutivo de seu macaco gigante, os militares criam sua própria Inteligência Artificial pronta para a batalha, o Macaco Mecha, mas seu primeiro teste prático dá terrivelmente errado. programme.title: Cães de Luta, (2013)
programme.desc: 2013. Na tradição de UNDERWORLD e DISTRICT 9, toda Manhattan fica em quarentena quando o vírus Lupin se espalha como fogo, transformando civis inocentes em lobos vorazes. Nada menos que uma explosão nuclear pode parar o vírus monstruoso. Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: Dennis Haysbert, Craig Sheffer, Ariana Richards, Ernie Hudson, Bill Duke, Wes Studi, Kate Vernon Diretor: Alexander Yellen

programme.title: Megalodon, (2018)

programme.title: O Resgate da Princesa, (1970)

programme.title: A Fé que nos Une, (1970)

programme.title: Império Proibido, (1970)

programme.title: Sob o Domínio dos Robôs, (1970)

programme.desc: 2017. Na dinastia Ming, onde o jovem general Qi Jiguang conquista uma importante vitória contra os piratas japoneses, comandando o exército chinês. Quando, quatro anos depois, sua nação é mais uma vez atacada, Qi se vê obrigado a retornar aos campos de batalha. programme.desc: 1970. Cowboys enfrentam touro selvagem; Bubba e Kaley esperam o bebê; Cody organiza rodeio; Booger doma cavalo selvagem; a vida no campo. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Jeito Cowboy - Alabama, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Bezerros rebeldes desafiam os rapazes; o sogro de Bubba lhe oferece um emprego. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Jeito Cowboy - Alabama, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Bubba lança um negócio; Cody vende um cavalo por um sonho; Booger sai para um encontro. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Jeito Cowboy - Alabama, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Os cowboys buscam um potro perdido; Booger tenta se aventurar nos encontros on-line; o cavalo doente de Bubba vai ao veterinário; Cody recebe uma grande notícia. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Jeito Cowboy - Alabama, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Bubba e os cowboys caçam um porco selvagem; Cody e Misty escolhem nomes para o bebê; Misty arma um encontro às cegas para Booger. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Jeito Cowboy - Alabama, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Bubba constrói um estábulo; Cody avança com sua casa dos sonhos. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Epiphany - Amor e Perdão, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma jovem luta para criar um relacionamento com o pai após a morte da tia que a criou. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: A Árvore da Vida, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. História de uma típica família americana dos anos 50, formada por um casal e três filhos. A rígida educação, o ambiente e o passado ainda permeiam a vida de Jack, o filho mais velho, que na vida adulta tenta se reconciliar com o pai. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Life - Um Retrato de James Dean, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Em 1955, o fotógrafo Dennis Stock acompanha James Dean em uma viagem para a fazenda da família do ator. No local, Stock registra as imagens mais famosas de toda a carreira de Dean. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Guerra ao Terror, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Membros do esquadrão antibombas do exército norte-americano enfrentam tarefas perigosas em Bagdá no final de sua missão. Apesar de alguns desentendimentos, eles sabem que cada dia concluído de trabalho é um dia a mais de vida. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Admiral Yamamoto - A Batalha de Pearl Harbor, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Isoroku Yamamoto, chefe da Marinha japonesa, foi responsável pelo ataque a Pearl Harbor. Os últimos quatro anos desta figura histórica foram longe do épico militarista, com dilemas de um personagem contra uma guerra que sabe que seu país não vencerá. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Double Dragon, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Jimmy captura seu irmão Billy e o leva ao Mestre das Sombras, mas o vilão se volta contra ele. Para escapar, os irmãos se transformam e enfrenam o Mestre. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Double Dragon, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Billy e Jimmy conhecem uma poderosa mestre do chi chamado Su Lien e seu aluno de lutador de sumô, Tsunami. Su Lien é enganada pelo Mestre das Sombras e Tsunami e os irmãos Lee precisam se unir para resgatá-la. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Double Dragon, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O Mestre das Sombras elabora um plano para introduzir uma nova droga em Metro City, chamada Oblivion. Os dragões duplos, com o Coronel McReady, tentam frustrar o plano do Mestre das Sombras. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Bikini Car Wash, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Jack, um universitário inconsequente, pode perder sua vaga na faculdade. Porém, seu professor oferece uma oportunidade de salvação e o coloca para gerenciar um lava-rápido. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Mau Exemplo de Cameron Post, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Em 1993, Cameron, uma estudante colegial, é forçada a passar pela terapia de conversão homossexual após ser flagrada com a rainha do baile de formatura. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Enviado do Céu, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O pastor Randy Michaels é enviado para uma missão em uma pequena cidade rural do Arizona. Lá, ele e sua família precisam se adaptar à mudança de ares e aos costumes de sua nova vizinhança. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: A História de Wim de A a Z, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Conheça a história do órfão Wim, um menino que quer muito ir à escola em vez de passar o tempo todo trabalhando forçadamente na fábrica da cidade. Com muita força de vontade, Wim consegue escapar e encontrar novos amigos. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Três Ladrões e um Bebê, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O compulsivo jogador Slipper vê o sequestro do neto de um magnata como a salvação de suas dívidas. Quando, com seu senhorio e o oportunista Octopus, sequestram BB, sem saber, frustram os planos do crime organizado, que também está atrás da criança. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Um Amor de Filhote, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um bandido chamado Mercer está envolvido em uma rinha ilegal de cães. O seu pastor alemão é mordido enquanto luta e consegue fugir. A jovem Paige Crowley encontra o cachorro e o leva para casa escondido de seu pai Travis e o batiza como Duke. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Ma ma, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Após ser diagnosticada com câncer de mama, Magda descobre estar grávida. Além de contar com o apoio de seu novo companheiro e do filho, ela acredita no poder de cura da menina que espera. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: A Vida em Espera, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O colapso nervoso de um homem faz com que ele deixe a esposa e viva no sótão por vários meses. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: A Outra Face da Guerra, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Após perder a mãe e a casa para as tropas invasoras alemãs, Artur encontra certo consolo em se juntar ao exército. No entanto, a guerra não é nada como ele imaginou. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Entrando numa Roubada, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Vitor vence um concurso de roteiros e ganha como prêmio R$ 100 mil para produzir um filme. Ele procura seus antigos colegas para participar de "Aceleração Máxima", que conta com assaltos a postos de gasolina, tiros e perseguições no enredo. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Garota em Chamas - Rebelião, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Ela perdeu a memória ainda jovem, mas essas lembranças escondem segredos sombrios. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Instinto Materno, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Após trauma, uma mãe solteira se muda com a filha para uma isolada fazenda no interior. Mas logo coisas sinistras voltam a acontecer e seus instintos maternos são colocados à prova novamente. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: O Ninho, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Samuel é um menino paraplégico que mora com a mãe Elena em uma mansão isolada. Quando conhece Denise, uma empregada adolescente, ele finalmente encontra forças para se opor às restrições de sua mãe e se abrir para o mundo. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: O Jantar, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. À medida que dois casais jantam em um restaurante sofisticado, seus discursos educados disfarçam que eles estão lutando com questões familiares importantes. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Alex Rider Contra o Tempo, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Alex Rider, adolescente britânico habilidoso em linguística, mergulho, artes marciais e tiro, é recrutado pelo MI6. Sua primeira missão é investigar o bilionário Darrius Sayle, que fez suspeitas doações de megacomputadores às escolas da Inglaterra. Gêneros: Drama

programme.sub-title: Uma Escolha Impossível: A Dor Dentro Do Coração De Tsunade

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Voltando Para Casa - T01E01
programme.desc: 2007. Na aldeia da folha, a equipe de konohamaru foi promovida a genin e agora vai a missões nível d sob a supervisão de ebisu. As constante reclamações de konohamaru lembra iruka e os outros de naruto.até que uma figura passa pelos portões. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Os Akatsuki Entram Em Ação - T01E02
programme.desc: 2007. Jiraiya completou seu novo romance, amassos no paraíso, para felicidade de kakashi. Mas jiraiya também trouxe notícias altamente secretas de que os akatsuki entraram em ação. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Os Resultados Do Treinamento - T01E03
programme.desc: 2007. As habilidades combinadas de naruto e sakura forçam kakashi usar seu sharingan imediatamente. Naruto habilmente lança um jutsu após outro. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Jinchuriki Da Areia - T01E04
programme.desc: 2007. Gaara rapidamente descobrir a presença da deidara, e uma batalha aérea com deidara em seu pássaro gigante e gaara acontece na areia. O jonin da areia é yura que, na verdade, é um agente da akatsuki, e a aldeia da areia sofre grandes danos. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Kazekage Se Mantém No Alto - T01E05
programme.desc: 2007. Naruto e sakura derrotam kakashi no desafio de sobrevivência. Tsunade os nomeia como uma equipe de três liderados por kakashi, e diz que agora eles são todos iguais. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Missão Cumprida - T01E06
programme.desc: 2007. Para proteger sua aldeia da argila explosiva de deidara, gaara usa seu chakra para criar um escudo de areia gigante. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Corra Kankuro - T01E07
programme.desc: 2007. Gaara, totalmente sem forças, é arrastado paralonge por deidara. Kankuro ignora esforços de baki de parar deidara e sai imediatamente em perseguição com um pelotão para salvar gaara. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Equipe Kakashi Se Mobiliza - T01E08
programme.desc: 2007. A caminho da aldeia da areia, temari encontra kakashi e sua equipe. Kakashi chama naruto quando ele tenta seguir adiante e naruto explode sua raiva pelos akatsuki. programme.title: 2019. Bucciarati acompanha Trish até a torre sineira para entregá-la ao pai finalmente, mas uma traição avassaladora põe em risco a vida dos dois. programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T04E27

programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T01E05

programme.title: 2012. Zeppeli ataca Tarkus, mesmo sabendo de seu destino terrível. Em um último ato de coragem, ele usa as forças que lhe restam para repassar seus poderes ao sucessor, JoJo. programme.title: 2012. JoJo resgata a irmã de Poco. Dire, um amigo de Zeppeli, bate de frente com Dio. Com a espada de Blueford nas mãos, JoJo volta a enfrentar Dio. programme.title: 2012. O ano é 1938. Em uma ruína mexicana, diversas máscaras de pedra são descobertas. Na cidade de Nova York, um jovem chamado Smokey recebe a ajuda de Joseph, o neto de JoJo. programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T01E11

programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T01E12

programme.title: 2013. Joseph usa seu poder para tentar fugir de Santviento. Quando isso não dá certo, ele tenta expor seu inimigo à luz do sol para se salvar. programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T01E13

programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T01E14

programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T01E15

programme.desc: When Jordan develops a crush on a girl at school, Bernie takes it upon himself to teach Jordan how to be a player and get the girl.
