programme.desc: A young woman (Anne Hathaway) embarks on a journey to break the curse of obedience placed upon her by a fairy godmother.

programme.title: Team America: World Police (2004)
programme.desc: Puppet commandos protect the planet from fiendish terrorists and North Korean dictator Kim Jong Il (Trey Parker).

programme.title: From
programme.desc: As Tabitha and Jade's troubling history is brought to light, things begin to unravel for another resident in town; Boyd wants to test a dangerous theory.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: A dangerous plan begins to take shape; how much is Boyd willing to risk for the chance to get everyone home?; Fatima and Henry find themselves at two very different and disturbing crossroads; Victor helps Tabitha and Ethan prepare for the worst.

programme.title: Overboard (1987)
programme.desc: A yachtsman's (Edward Herrmann) wife (Goldie Hawn) falls overboard, forgets who she is and becomes an Oregon carpenter's (Kurt Russell) mate.

programme.title: I Love You, Man (2009)
programme.desc: As a bridegroom's bond with his new best friend grows, it threatens his relationship with his fiancée.

programme.title: The Curious Case of Benjamin Button (2008)
programme.sub-title: The Curious Case of Benjamin Button (2008)
programme.desc: Benjamin Button (Brad Pitt) is born an old man in 1918 New Orleans and ages in reverse and, in so doing, becomes intimately familiar with the natures of love and death.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: A dangerous plan begins to take shape; how much is Boyd willing to risk for the chance to get everyone home?; Fatima and Henry find themselves at two very different and disturbing crossroads; Victor helps Tabitha and Ethan prepare for the worst.

programme.title: The Man in the Moon (1991)
programme.desc: A couple's (Sam Waterston, Tess Harper) two daughters catch the eye of their new teenage neighbor in 1957 Louisiana.

programme.title: The Shootist (1976)
programme.desc: People pester an old, dying gunfighter (John Wayne) rooming with a widow (Lauren Bacall) in 1901 Nevada.

programme.title: The Unforgiven (1960)
programme.desc: A Texas woman (Lillian Gish) and her eldest son (Burt Lancaster) fight Kiowas over an adopted daughter (Audrey Hepburn).

programme.title: A Fistful of Dynamite (1971)
programme.desc: A thief and a dynamite-tossing Irish revolutionary inadvertently become embroiled in the Mexican Revolution.

programme.title: Mulholland Falls (1996)
programme.desc: An ex-lover's murder creates problems for the married head (Nick Nolte) of an elite police unit in early '50s Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Good, the Bad and the Ugly (1966)
programme.sub-title: The Good, the Bad and the Ugly (1966)
programme.desc: A drifter, a bandit and a bounty hunter reach a standoff over buried gold.

programme.title: Enchanted April (1991)
programme.desc: An English novelist's wife (Miranda Richardson) rents an Italian villa with a widow (Joan Plowright) and two other women.

programme.title: Cold Mountain (2003)
programme.desc: During the Civil War, a wounded Confederate soldier (Jude Law) abandons his duties to make his way home to his sweetheart (Nicole Kidman).

programme.title: Thelma & Louise (1991)
programme.desc: An Arkansas waitress (Susan Sarandon) and a housewife (Geena Davis) shoot a rapist and take off in a '66 Thunderbird.

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight (2017)
programme.desc: As war with the Transformers rages on, inventor Cade Yeager forms an unlikely alliance with Bumblebee, an English lord and an Oxford professor to save the planet.

programme.title: Better Man (2024)
programme.desc: The true story of the meteoric rise, dramatic fall, and remarkable resurgence of British pop superstar Robbie Williams.

programme.title: Neil Young: Heart of Gold (2006)
programme.desc: Filmmaker Jonathan Demme captures the rocker in concert before a live audience at Ryman Auditorium in Nashville, Tenn.

programme.title: Scared Stiff (1953)
programme.desc: Gangsters chase a singer (Dean Martin) and his sidekick (Jerry Lewis) to an heiress's (Lizabeth Scott) haunted castle off Cuba.

programme.title: The Barefoot Contessa (1954)
programme.desc: Flashbacks at a funeral reveal how a Madrid nightclub dancer was propelled to instant stardom and eventual misfortune.

programme.title: Missing in Action (1984)
programme.desc: A U.S. colonel (Chuck Norris) escapes from the Viet Cong, then comes back with a floating arsenal to get others out.

programme.title: Beauty Shop (2005)
programme.desc: After a falling-out with an overbearing employer, reputed hairstylist Gina decides to go independent. Soon enough, she opens the doors of her new salon to an amusing crowd of patrons.

programme.title: Coyotes (2025)
programme.desc: Members of a family find themselves in a desperate fight for survival when a pack of coyotes swarms their Hollywood Hills home.

programme.title: The Relic (1997)
programme.desc: A homicide detective (Tom Sizemore) helps a biologist (Penelope Ann Miller) hunt a giant creature that is killing people in a Chicago museum.

programme.title: Poltergeist II: The Other Side (1986)
programme.desc: An American Indian helps a broke and homeless family (JoBeth Williams, Craig T. Nelson), once again prey to a poltergeist (Julian Beck).

programme.title: Face/Off (1997)
programme.desc: An FBI agent (John Travolta) and his nemesis (Nicolas Cage) trade physical identities.

programme.title: Homefront (2013)
programme.desc: A former DEA agent (Jason Statham) returns to action to save his daughter and his new town from a drug-dealing sociopath (James Franco).

programme.title: Quantum of Solace (2008)
programme.desc: James Bond's (Daniel Craig) hunt for those responsible for Vesper Lynd's death leads him to a ruthless businessman (Mathieu Amalric) who is plotting to seize control of a valuable resource.

programme.title: Defiance (2008)
programme.desc: In 1941 three refugee brothers (Daniel Craig, Liev Schreiber, Jamie Bell) turn a daily struggle to survive into a personal battle to save their people from the Nazis.

programme.title: Witness (1985)
programme.desc: An eight-year-old Amish boy witnesses a drug-related murder in a Philadelphia train station. The Philadelphia police captain discovers that the murderers are cops trying to squelch a corruption investigation.

programme.title: The Hurricane (1999)
programme.desc: Aided by a Brooklyn teen (Vicellous Reon Shannon) and three Canadians, boxer Rubin Carter (Denzel Washington) fights to be exonerated after long imprisonment for murders he did not commit.

programme.title: Run & Gun (2021)
programme.desc: A former criminal gets blackmailed into one last job to collect a mysterious package. After a deadly double-cross, he soon finds himself wounded and on the run from ruthless assassins who will stop at nothing to get what he has.

programme.title: The Firm (1993)
programme.desc: A law-school grad uncovers a sinister secret about the Tennessee firm that made him an offer he couldn't refuse.

programme.title: Eagle Eye (2008)
programme.desc: Two strangers (Shia LaBeouf, Michelle Monaghan) become pawns of a mysterious woman who threatens their friends and family and uses technology to control their actions.

programme.title: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider (2001)
programme.desc: A beautiful globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) battles otherworldly creatures for possession of a powerful artifact.

programme.title: Breach (2020)
programme.desc: Fleeing a devastating plague on Earth, an interstellar ark comes under attack from a new threat -- a shape-shifting alien force intent on slaughtering what's left of humanity.

programme.title: Not Without Hope (2025)
programme.desc: Four friends face disaster when their boat capsizes in the Gulf of Mexico. Battling massive waves, sharks, dehydration and hypothermia, they cling to hope as the Coast Guard launches a daring rescue through a raging storm to save them.

programme.title: Scream (1996)
programme.desc: A psycho killer targets a past victim's daughter (Neve Campbell), while a tabloid TV reporter (Courteney Cox) homes in on his identity.

programme.title: Faster (2010)
programme.desc: A veteran cop (Billy Bob Thornton) and an assassin (Oliver Jackson-Cohen) track an ex-convict (Dwayne Johnson) who is on a mission to take revenge on his brother's killers.

programme.title: Fatman (2020)
programme.desc: After receiving a lump of coal in his stocking, a disgruntled 12-year-old hires a highly skilled assassin to kill Santa Claus.

programme.title: Masterminds (2016)
programme.desc: An armored-car driver (Zach Galifianakis) helps a flirty co-worker (Kristen Wiig) and her friends pull off a heist, then finds himself holding the bag after they double-cross him.

programme.title: Buddy Games (2019)
programme.desc: After a falling out, six lifelong friends reunite to play the buddy games -- an insane competition filled with absurd physical and mental challenges. Now, all bets are off, as the determined pals fight, claw and party for the chance to win $150,000.

programme.title: Buddy Games: Spring Awakening (2023)
programme.desc: Faced with their biggest challenge yet, the gang sets out to honor a lost pal, only to find themselves in the middle of where it all began -- spring break. They soon learn their old school ways of partying can hardly compete with today's generation.

programme.title: Seven Psychopaths (2012)
programme.desc: A struggling screenwriter (Colin Farrell) finds himself inadvertently entangled in the criminal underworld when his knucklehead friends (Christopher Walken, Sam Rockwell) abduct a mobster's beloved Shih Tzu.

programme.title: Masterminds (2016)
programme.desc: An armored-car driver (Zach Galifianakis) helps a flirty co-worker (Kristen Wiig) and her friends pull off a heist, then finds himself holding the bag after they double-cross him.

programme.title: The Comeback Trail (2020)
programme.desc: Indebted to a mobster, a desperate producer tries to "accidentally" kill an aging movie star for an insurance scam. However, he soon begins to realize that the film they're shooting is a masterpiece in the making.

programme.title: World Trade Center (2006)
programme.desc: Two Port Authority officers become trapped in the rubble of the World Trade Center after going in to help people escape from the buildings during the terrorist attacks of September 11, 2001.

programme.title: The Hunt for Red October (1990)
programme.desc: Moscow, Washington and a CIA analyst (Alec Baldwin) track a renegade Soviet captain (Sean Connery) and his new submarine.

programme.title: Flags of Our Fathers (2006)
programme.desc: Some of the servicemen who raised the U.S. flag on Mount Suribachi during the Battle of Iwo Jima at the end of World War II live to hear of their status as heroes.

programme.title: No Country for Old Men (2007)
programme.desc: An aging lawman (Tommy Lee Jones) reflects on his past and laments a changing world while trying to find and protect a hunter who took the cash from a drug deal gone bad.

programme.title: Most Wanted (2020)
programme.desc: An investigative reporter fights to expose the twisted truth behind a heroin bust orchestrated by dirty cops to frame an innocent man -- sentencing him to life in a Thai prison.

programme.title: The Godfather (1972)
programme.desc: Crime boss Vito Corleone and his sons, the ruthless yet loyal members of the Corleone family, rule their secretive New York empire with an iron fist.

programme.title: The Godfather, Part II (1974)
programme.desc: Michael Corleone (Al Pacino) rules his father's criminal empire, while flashbacks recall young Vito's (Robert De Niro) climb to power.

programme.title: The Godfather, Coda: The Death of Michael Corleone (1990)
programme.sub-title: The Godfather, Coda: The Death of Michael Corleone (1990)
programme.desc: Dignified Michael Corleone (Al Pacino) joins his wild nephew in a Sicilian vendetta involving the Vatican.

programme.title: Molly's Game (2017)
programme.desc: Molly Bloom runs the world's most exclusive high-stakes poker game for a decade before being arrested by the FBI. Her only ally is defense lawyer Charlie Jaffey, who learns that there is much more to Molly than the tabloids lead people to believe.

programme.title: Ride (2024)
programme.desc: Desperate to raise money for his daughter's cancer treatment, a retired bull rider teams up with his estranged son to orchestrate a robbery. However, they must soon outwit the local police if they want to keep the cash and their freedom.

programme.title: The Infernal Machine (2022)
programme.desc: Reclusive and controversial author Bruce Cogburn is drawn out of hiding when he begins to receive endless letters from an obsessive fan. What ensues is a dangerous labyrinth as Bruce searches for the person behind the cryptic messages.

programme.title: Barron's Cove (2024)
programme.desc: A man with a violent past kidnaps the boy he holds responsible for his son's death. As he grows closer to uncovering the truth, he's left to wonder whether his pursuers are really seeking to protect the boy, or merely the secrets he keeps.

programme.title: Cheech & Chong's Last Movie (2024)
programme.desc: Cheech Marin and Tommy Chong discuss their lifelong friendship and popularity as a comedic duo. Features interviews, sketches and never-before-seen footage spanning their five-decade career.

programme.title: Last Vegas (2013)
programme.desc: Aging friends (Michael Douglas, Robert De Niro, Morgan Freeman) head to Las Vegas to celebrate the end of one's long bachelorhood and relive their glory days.

programme.title: Undisputed (2002)
programme.desc: An undefeated world-champion prizefighter, who is convicted of rape and sent to prison, must confront and fight the reigning prison boxing champion.

programme.title: Kate & Leopold (2001)
programme.desc: A Manhattan woman (Meg Ryan) falls in love with the 19th-century Duke of Albany (Hugh Jackman) who has stepped through a time portal.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Diary (2001)
programme.desc: An outrageous British woman (Renée Zellweger) decides to take control of her life, but instead falls for two very different men (Colin Firth, Hugh Grant).

programme.title: The Tribes of Palos Verdes (2017)
programme.desc: When the situation at her idyllic Palos Verdes home turns volatile, young Medina attempts to surf her way to happiness.

programme.title: The Reader (2008)
programme.desc: In postwar Germany, a teenager (David Kross) has a love affair with an older woman (Kate Winslet) who is hiding a terrible secret.

programme.title: L Word Mississippi: Hate the Sin
programme.desc: Exploring the lives of gay women living in the conservative, religious deep South and the unique hardships, bigotry, bullying, sexism and racism they endure.

programme.title: Rumours (2024)
programme.desc: Leaders of the world's wealthiest democracies become spectacles of incompetence, contending with increasingly surreal obstacles as night falls in the misty woods, and they realize they are suddenly alone.

programme.title: The L Word
programme.desc: A group of friends lives in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Frida (2002)
programme.desc: Mexican painter Frida Kahlo (Salma Hayek) marries fellow artist Diego Rivera who shares her radical political views.

programme.title: The Aviator (2004)
programme.desc: During the 1930s and '40s, wealthy industrialist Howard Hughes (Leonardo DiCaprio) gains fame as a movie producer, airplane designer and pilot.

programme.title: The General's Daughter (1999)
programme.desc: Two investigators (John Travolta, Madeleine Stowe) find an underworld of sex and cover-ups behind an Army captain's murder.

programme.title: 4:44 Last Day on Earth (2011)
programme.desc: Two lovers (Willem Dafoe, Shanyn Leigh) immerse themselves in sex, art and other activities after word breaks that the world will end by the next morning.

programme.title: My Psychedelic Love Story (2020)
programme.desc: Filmmaker Errol Morris examines the love affair between LSD guru Timothy Leary and Joanna Harcourt-Smith.

programme.title: Pretty Red Dress (2022)
programme.desc: The story of Travis, Candice and their daughter, Kenisha, and their relationships with the same red dress.

programme.title: Shall We Dance? (2004)
programme.desc: A married Chicago attorney (Richard Gere) takes dancing lessons with a beautiful woman (Jennifer Lopez) he saw through a window.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Baby (2016)
programme.desc: Befuddled mom-to-be Bridget Jones (Renée Zellweger) must figure out which of the two men (Colin Firth, Patrick Dempsey) in her life is the father of her child.

programme.title: Wakefield (2016)
programme.desc: Howard Wakefield, a New York City lawyer, hides out in the attic of his home for weeks. When a former boyfriend re-enters his wife's life, he realizes that he may not be able to return to the life he has abandoned.

programme.title: Unhook the Stars (1996)
programme.desc: A suburban widow (Gena Rowlands) fights with a daughter, befriends an abused neighbor's (Marisa Tomei) son and gains a trucker's (Gérard Depardieu) infatuation.

programme.title: Terms of Endearment (1983)
programme.desc: A strong-willed woman (Shirley MacLaine) and her equally independent daughter (Debra Winger) keep the lines of communication open as each deals with the curveballs life throws at them.

programme.title: The Friend (2024)
programme.desc: Iris finds her comfortable New York City life thrown into disarray after her closest friend and mentor bequeaths her a Great Dane named Apollo. Yet as Iris finds herself unexpectedly bonding with Apollo, she begins to come to terms with her past.

programme.title: Daniela Forever (2024)
programme.desc: After his girlfriend dies in an accident, a grieving man joins a sleep trial that allows him to rebuild his life with her through the use of lucid dreams.

programme.title: An Unfinished Life (2005)
programme.desc: Old wounds get a chance to heal when a Wyoming rancher (Robert Redford) shelters his abused daughter-in-law (Jennifer Lopez) and her child.

programme.title: The Lovers (2014)
programme.desc: An impossible love blooms across two time periods and continents.

programme.title: The Fan (1981)
programme.desc: Douglas, a record salesman, is an obsessive fan of actress Sally Ross. When his letters are rejected, he strikes out at her and her loved ones.

programme.title: Beyond the Opposite Sex (2018)
programme.desc: A transgender man and woman face the challenges of maintaining relationships.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Baby (2016)
programme.desc: Befuddled mom-to-be Bridget Jones (Renée Zellweger) must figure out which of the two men (Colin Firth, Patrick Dempsey) in her life is the father of her child.

programme.title: La Madrina: The Savage Life of Lorine Padilla (2020)
programme.sub-title: La Madrina: The Savage Life of Lorine Padilla (2020)
programme.desc: Lorine Padilla joins a street gang in the Bronx, N.Y., before becoming an activist and spiritual adviser.

programme.title: Vanilla Sky (2001)
programme.desc: A wealthy womanizer (Tom Cruise) has trouble distinguishing dreams from reality after a car accident leaves him disfigured.

programme.title: Chocolat (2000)
programme.desc: The mayor opposes a single mother (Juliette Binoche) who is opening a chocolate shop in his 1950s French village across from a church during Lent.

programme.title: Irena's Vow (2023)
programme.desc: Caught in a German roundup to be used as a slave laborer, Polish nurse Irena Gut becomes a German army major's housekeeper during World War II. Irena risks her life to conceal a dozen Jews within the major's home.

programme.title: L Word Mississippi: Hate the Sin
programme.desc: Exploring the lives of gay women living in the conservative, religious deep South and the unique hardships, bigotry, bullying, sexism and racism they endure.

programme.title: I, Daniel Blake (2016)
programme.desc: While fighting to keep his welfare benefits, a widowed British carpenter (Dave Johns) begins to develop a strong bond with a destitute, single mother (Hayley Squires) who's struggling to take care of her two children.

programme.title: Failure to Launch (2006)
programme.desc: The parents of a young man (Matthew McConaughey) who still lives at home hire a beautiful woman (Sarah Jessica Parker) to entice him to finally leave the nest.

programme.title: MLF Team Series
programme.desc: Three teams compete in Florida for Knockout Match 1 of the Summit Cup to advance to the Championship.

programme.title: Hooked on Africa Best of
programme.desc: The Kafue is one of the major tributaries of the great Zambezi. It runs through the Kafue National Park and supports a plethora of wildlife. We were of course looking for the fauna that lay below the surface and were soon testing patterns against.

programme.title: Inside Angling
programme.desc: Inside Angling visits Situ Island found in the Mozambican waters, to tackle those sought after blue-water game fish. Craig Thomassen and his partner end up catching a variety of tropical game fish, enjoying every fight to the fullest.

programme.title: Wildfly Best of
programme.desc: The Royal Flush, a hand that beats all others and one that is notoriously difficult to compile. We study the team's poker faces as they race against each other to land five different freshwater species in a single day.

programme.title: Wild Fish Masterclass With Mike Robinson
programme.desc: Mike and Chef Jon Coates create Pollack Kiev with minted peas, triple cooked fries and a luxurious Herb Beurre blanc.
